{{Quote|Qi'ra. Pretty. My friend back home? He's called Weegee. Not as pretty a name, but I like him the same.|Kanina Nico|<ref name="Imperial Cadet 4" />}}
'''Weegee''' was a [[human]] [[Gender|male]] who lived on a [[Unidentified planet (Kanina Nico)|planet]] in the [[Huru system]] where he [[Miner|mined]] [[farium]]. He was a friend of [[Kanina Nico]].<ref name="Imperial Cadet 5" />
